message.content:
@startuml
participant "ユーザー" as User1
participant "ユーザー" as User2
participant "ブラウザ" as Browser1
participant "ブラウザ" as Browser2
participant "web.php" as WebPhp
participant "JissyuController" as JissyuController

User1 -- Browser1
User2 -- Browser2

User1 --> Browser1 : 該当ページをリクエスト[/jissyu2]
Browser1 --> WebPhp : GET[/jissyu2]
WebPhp --> JissyuController : @index
JissyuController --> Browser2 : 該当ページをリクエスト[/jissyu2]
@enduml
